hotels.name: Egerton House
hotels.description_fr:
Cet hôtel de luxe 5 étoiles est situé dans le quartier de Knightsbridge à Londres, et donne sur des jardins paisibles. Il propose une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite et des chambres climatisées avec literie de luxe, minibar, télévision à écran plat et haut-parleurs Bluetooth.
L’Egerton House se trouve à moins de 3 minutes à pied des grands magasins Harrods et Harvey Nichols. Les musées de Kensington sont accessibles en 5 minutes à pied. Les stations de métro Knightsbridge et South Kensington sont à 750 mètres.
Les chambres sont équipées de matelas cousus main, de meubles anciens, d’œuvres d’art originales et de salles de bains en marbre. Des peignoirs de luxe, des articles de toilette Floris, de l’eau minérale, ainsi que des fruits et des fleurs frais sont fournis.
hotels.description_en:
This 5-star luxury hotel is in London's Knightsbridge, looking out over quiet gardens. It offers free Wi-Fi and air-conditioned rooms with luxury bedding, minibars, flat-screen TVs and Bluetooth speakers.
Egerton House is less than a 3-minute walk from Harrods and  Harvey Nichols department stores and the Kensington museums are within a 5-minute walk. Knightsbridge and South Kensington Tube stations are 750 metres away.
Rooms have hand-stitched mattresses, antique furniture, original artworks and marble bathrooms. There are luxury bathrobes, Floris toiletries, mineral water and fresh fruit and flowers.
Traditional English afternoon teas are available and the quiet bar serves light snacks and cocktails.
The hotel offers a butler service and a large menu from 07:00 to 22:00.
hotels.description_es:
Descubre cómo se sienten las estrellas con el mejor servicio en el Egerton House

Rooms have hand-stitched mattresses, antique furniture, original artworks and marble bathrooms. There are luxury bathrobes, Floris toiletries, mineral water and fresh fruit and flowers.
Traditional English afternoon teas are available and the quiet bar serves light snacks and cocktails.
hotels.description_pt:
Sinta-se como uma celebridade com o serviço de topo de Egerton House

Egerton House is less than a 3-minute walk from Harrods and  Harvey Nichols department stores and the Kensington museums are within a 5-minute walk. Knightsbridge and South Kensington Tube stations are 750 metres away.
Rooms have hand-stitched mattresses, antique furniture, original artworks and marble bathrooms. There are luxury bathrobes, Floris toiletries, mineral water and fresh fruit and flowers.
Traditional English afternoon teas are available and the quiet bar serves light snacks and cocktails.
hotels.description_it:
Vivi un'esperienza esclusiva con il servizio di prima classe presso Egerton House
Questo hotel di lusso a 5 stelle si trova a Knightsbridge, a Londra, e si affaccia su tranquilli giardini. La connessione WiFi è gratuita e le sistemazioni sono dotate di aria condizionata, biancheria da letto di lusso, un minibar, una TV a schermo piatto e degli altoparlanti Bluetooth.
L’Egerton House dista meno di 3 minuti a piedi dai Centri Commerciali Harrods e Harvey Nichols, mentre i Musei del Quartiere Kensington sono raggiungibili con una passeggiata di 5 minuti. Le Stazioni Metro Knightsbridge e South Kensington sono situate a 750 metri.
Le camere dispongono di materassi cuciti a mano, mobili antichi, opere d’arte originali e bagni in marmo.

hotels.name: Knightsbridge Hotel, Firmdale Hotels
hotels.description_fr:
L'établissement 5 étoiles Knightsbridge Hotel est situé dans une rue calme au cœur de Londres et dispose d'une réception ouverte 24h/24. Il propose des services de voiturier et de concierge ainsi que des chambres spacieuses pourvues d'articles de toilette Rik Rak par Kit Kemp.
Le Knightsbridge Hotel assure un service d'étage 24h/24, dans les chambres ainsi que dans le salon et la bibliothèque du rez-de-chaussée, y compris un goûter. Vous trouverez de nombreux bars et restaurants à 5 minutes à pied.
Les chambres sont toutes décorées différemment avec goût et disposent d'une luxueuse salle de bains dotée de peignoirs ainsi que de chaussons. Elles comprennent aussi une télévision à écran plat avec lecteur DVD et une station d'accueil pour iPod.
hotels.description_en:
With a 24-hour front desk, this 5-star hotel is located in a quiet street in the heart of London. It offers valet and concierge services, and spacious bedrooms with Rik Rak by Kit Kemp bath products.
The Knightsbridge Hotel offers 24-hour room service served in the guest rooms or in the ground floor library and drawing room, including afternoon tea. There are many bars and restaurants a 5-minute walk away.
Individually and tastefully decorated, each room has a luxurious bathroom with bathrobes and slippers. There is also a flat-screen TV with DVD player, and an iPod docking station.
Hyde Park, Harrods and the international designer stores of Sloane Street and Brompton Cross are a minute's walk away. The Knightsbridge offers a car pick up service at a charge.
hotels.description_es:
Descubre cómo se sienten las estrellas con el mejor servicio en el Knightsbridge Hotel, Firmdale Hotels

Este hotel de 5 estrellas se encuentra en una calle tranquila del corazón de Londres y ofrece servicio de recepción las 24 horas. Proporciona servicios de aparcacoches y de conserjería y dispone de habitaciones amplias con artículos de aseo Rik Rak by Kit Kemp.

El servicio de habitaciones del Knightsbridge Hotel, disponible las 24 horas, sirve la merienda y otras comidas en las habitaciones o en el salón biblioteca de la planta baja. Además, hay numerosos bares y restaurantes a 5 minutos a pie.

Las habitaciones son elegantes y están decoradas de forma individual.
hotels.description_pt:
Sinta-se como uma celebridade com o serviço de topo de Knightsbridge Hotel, Firmdale Hotels

Com uma recepção 24 horas, este hotel de 5 estrelas está localizado numa rua tranquila, no coração de Londres. Providencia serviços de estacionamento personalizado e de concierge, assim como quartos espaçosos com produtos de higiene pessoal Rik Rak by Kit Kemp.

O Knightsbridge Hotel disponibiliza um serviço de quartos 24 horas, que pode ser prestado nos quartos ou na biblioteca e na sala de estar do piso térreo e inclui chá da tarde. Existem muitos bares e restaurantes a uma caminhada de 5 minutos.

Todos os quartos têm uma elegante decoração individual e uma casa de banho luxuosa com roupões de banho e chinelos.
hotels.description_it:
Vivi un'esperienza esclusiva con il servizio di prima classe presso Knightsbridge Hotel, Firmdale Hotels

Situato in una tranquilla via nel cuore di Londra, questo hotel a 5 stelle offre servizi concierge e di parcheggio e riconsegna auto, una reception aperta 24 ore su 24 e ampie sistemazioni con set di cortesia Rik Rak by Kit Kemp.

Il Knightsbridge Hotel fornisce il servizio in camera 24 ore al giorno nel vostro alloggio o nella biblioteca e nel salotto al piano terra, anche per il tè pomeridiano. A 5 minuti di cammino troverete numerosi bar e ristoranti.

Arredate con gusto in uno stile personalizzato, le camere sono dotate di bagno di lusso con accappatoi e pantofole, TV a schermo piatto con lettore DVD e docking station per iPod.

hotels.name: The Soho Hotel, Firmdale Hotels
hotels.description_fr:
Situé à 5 minutes à pied d'Oxford Street, l’établissement The Soho Hotel, Firmdale Hotels dispose d'une salle de sport entièrement équipée avec un coach personnel sur place. Les places Piccadilly Circus et Leicester Square se trouvent à moins de 10 minutes à pied de l'hôtel. De nombreuses stations de métro sont également à proximité.
Vous trouverez une sélection des meilleurs restaurants et bars de Londres, des cafés, des théâtres et des lieux de vie nocturne à quelques pas de l'hôtel, ainsi que le quartier historique de Soho Square, qui dispose d'un parc et d'un jardin.
Toutes les chambres de l’établissement The Soho sont climatisées. Elles comprennent une télévision à écran plat et un minibar bien approvisionné. Vous bénéficierez également d’une salle de bains privative.
hotels.description_en:
Situated 5 minutes’ walk from Oxford Street, The Soho Hotel features a fully equipped gym with an on-site personal trainer available. Piccadilly Circus and Leicester Square are within a 10-minute walk of the hotel, as well as many tube stations.
A selection of London's best restaurants and bars, cafés, theatres and nightlife are within walking distance of the hotel, as well as the historic area of Soho Square which features a park and garden.
Each air-conditioned room at The Soho includes a flat-screen TV, fully stocked minibar. An en suite bathroom is also provided. Guests can also make use of a beauty treatment room, which offers full body massage, facials and manicures.
Modern European cuisine is served in the on-site restaurant, which also offers a breakfast menu and afternoon tea.
hotels.description_es:
Descubre cómo se sienten las estrellas con el mejor servicio en el The Soho Hotel, Firmdale Hotels

Situated 5 minutes’ walk from Oxford Street, The Soho Hotel features a fully equipped gym with an on-site personal trainer available. Piccadilly Circus and Leicester Square are within a 10-minute walk of the hotel, as well as many tube stations.

A selection of London's best restaurants and bars, cafés, theatres and nightlife are within walking distance of the hotel, as well as the historic area of Soho Square which features a park and garden.

Each air-conditioned room at The Soho includes a flat-screen TV, fully stocked minibar. An en suite bathroom is also provided. Guests can also make use of a beauty treatment room, which offers full body massage, facials and manicures.
hotels.description_pt:
Sinta-se como uma celebridade com o serviço de topo de The Soho Hotel, Firmdale Hotels

Situated 5 minutes’ walk from Oxford Street, The Soho Hotel features a fully equipped gym with an on-site personal trainer available. Piccadilly Circus and Leicester Square are within a 10-minute walk of the hotel, as well as many tube stations.

A selection of London's best restaurants and bars, cafés, theatres and nightlife are within walking distance of the hotel, as well as the historic area of Soho Square which features a park and garden.

Each air-conditioned room at The Soho includes a flat-screen TV, fully stocked minibar. An en suite bathroom is also provided. Guests can also make use of a beauty treatment room, which offers full body massage, facials and manicures.
hotels.description_it:
Vivi un'esperienza esclusiva con il servizio di prima classe presso The Soho Hotel, Firmdale Hotels

Situato a 5 minuti a piedi da Oxford Street, il Soho Hotel offre una palestra completamente attrezzata con personal trainer. Piccadilly Circus, Leicester Square e molte stazioni della metropolitana sono raggiungibili in 10 minuti a piedi dall'hotel.

A pochi passi troverete una selezione dei migliori ristoranti e bar, caffetterie, teatri e locali notturni di Londra, e la storica zona di Soho Square, che ospita un parco e un giardino.

Tutte le camere del Soho Hotel sono climatizzate e dotate di TV a schermo piatto e minibar ben fornito. Avrete a disposizione inoltre un bagno interno.

hotels.name: The Osborne
hotels.description_fr:
Situé juste en face de la plage de Shanklin, le The Osborne propose un hébergement réservé aux adultes et un Bed & Breakfast sur la côte est de l'île de Wight. Dotée d'une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite, cette maison d'hôtes se trouve à proximité du centre-ville. à seulement 2 minutes à pied du Shanklin Chine.

Chaque chambre dispose d'une télévision à écran plat, d'un réfrigérateur silencieux, d'une armoire et d'un plateau/bouilloire. Leur salle de bains privative est pourvue d'un sèche-cheveux et d'articles de toilette gratuits.

Le The Osborne sert une gamme de petits-déjeuners chauds et froids.
Vous trouverez de nombreux cafés, pubs et restaurants à quelques pas, dont plusieurs le long du front de mer.
hotels.description_en:
Just across the road from Shanklin beach, The Osborne is ADULTS-ONLY accommodation, and offers bed and breakfast on the Isle of Wight’s eastern coast. With free Wi-Fi, this guest house is close to the town centre and just 2 minutes’ walk from the Shanklin Chine.

Each guest room has a flat-screen TV, silent fridge, wardrobe and tea and coffee facilities. All have en suite facilities with hairdryer and complimentary toiletries supplied.

The Osborne serves a range of hot and cold breakfasts.
Many cafés, pubs and restaurants are within a short walk, with several along the seafront.

This bed and breakfast is around 15 minutes’ drive from the Botanic Garden in Ventnor, and 7 miles from Bembridge Windmill.
hotels.description_es:
El The Osborne es un bed and breakfast solo para adultos situado frente a la playa de Shanklin, en la costa este de la isla de Wight. Este establecimiento está cerca del centro de la ciudad y ofrece conexión Wi-Fi gratuita. El Shanklin Chine está a solo 2 minutos a pie.

Las habitaciones disponen de TV de pantalla plana, nevera silenciosa, armario y set de té y café. Todas tienen baño con secador de pelo y artículos de aseo gratuitos.

El The Osborne sirve una variedad de desayunos fríos y calientes.
Hay muchas cafeterías, pubs y restaurantes a poca distancia a pie, y varios a lo largo del paseo marítimo.

Este bed and breakfast se encuentra a unos 15 minutos en coche del jardín botánico de Ventnor y a 7 millas del molino de viento de Bembridge.
hotels.description_pt:
Just across the road from Shanklin beach, The Osborne is ADULTS-ONLY accommodation, and offers bed and breakfast on the Isle of Wight’s eastern coast. With free Wi-Fi, this guest house is close to the town centre and just 2 minutes’ walk from the Shanklin Chine.

Each guest room has a flat-screen TV, silent fridge, wardrobe and tea and coffee facilities. All have en suite facilities with hairdryer and complimentary toiletries supplied.

The Osborne serves a range of hot and cold breakfasts.
Many cafés, pubs and restaurants are within a short walk, with several along the seafront.

This bed and breakfast is around 15 minutes’ drive from the Botanic Garden in Ventnor, and 7 miles from Bembridge Windmill.

hotels.name: Chapel House
hotels.description_fr:
Situé à Ventnor, l’hébergement Chapel House met à votre disposition une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite et offre une vue sur la mer. Cet hébergement est installé à 3,8 km de : Blackgang Chine. Il comprend un jardin et un parking privé gratuit.
Cette maison de vacances possède 3 chambres, une télévision, une cuisine équipée avec un réfrigérateur et un lave-vaisselle, un lave-linge, ainsi que 3 salles de bains avec une douche.
Vous pourrez pratiquer le vélo dans les environs.
Vous séjournerez à respectivement 20 km et 9,2 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Osborne House et The Isle of Wight Donkey Sanctuary. L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport de Bournemouth) est à 57 km.
Les distances indiquées dans la description de l'établissement sont calculées avec © OpenStreetMap.
hotels.description_en:
Spacious Accommodation: Chapel House in Ventnor offers a spacious holiday home with three bedrooms and three bathrooms. The property features a fully equipped kitchen, washing machine, and a cosy fireplace.
Outdoor Spaces: Guests can relax in the private garden or enjoy sea views from the seating area. Free WiFi is available throughout the property, ensuring connectivity during the stay.
Convenient Amenities: The holiday home includes a dishwasher, microwave, and a walk-in shower. Additional facilities include a washing machine, refrigerator, and a dining area.
Local Attractions: Blackgang Chine is 3.8 km away, Osborne House 20 km, and The Isle of Wight Donkey Sanctuary 9 km from the property. Bournemouth Airport is 57 km distant.
hotels.description_es:
Chapel House es un alojamiento con wifi gratis y vistas al mar que se encuentra en Ventnor. El alojamiento, que está a 3,8 km de Parque temático Blackgang Chine, dispone de jardín y parking privado gratis.
La casa o chalet tiene 3 dormitorios, TV, una cocina equipada con nevera y lavavajillas, lavadora y 3 baños con ducha.
Se puede practicar ciclismo en los alrededores.
Castillo de Osborne está a 20 km del alojamiento, y The Isle of Wight Donkey Sanctuary está a 9,2 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Bournemouth) está a 57 km.
Las distancias en la descripción del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMap©
hotels.description_pt:
Com acesso Wi-Fi gratuito e vista do mar, Chapel House encontra-se em Ventnor. Situado a 3,8 km de Blackgang Chine, o alojamento apresenta um jardim e estacionamento privado gratuito.
Esta casa de férias tem 3 quartos, uma televisão, uma cozinha equipada com frigorífico e máquina de lavar louça, uma máquina de lavar roupa e 3 casas de banho com chuveiro.
É possível praticar ciclismo nas proximidades.
Osborne House fica a 20 km de Chapel House, enquanto The Isle of Wight Donkey Sanctuary está a 9,2 km da propriedade. O Aeroporto de Bournemouth fica a 57 km de distância.
A distância mencionada na descrição do alojamento é calculada com o © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_it:
Chapel House offre un alloggio nella città di Ventnor e dispone di WiFi gratuito e vista sul mare. Situata a 3,8 km da Parco Divertimenti Blackgang Chine, la struttura propone un giardino e il parcheggio privato gratuito.
Questa casa vacanze offre 3 camere da letto, una TV, una cucina con frigorifero e lavastoviglie, una lavatrice e 3 bagni con doccia.
Nelle vicinanze potrete praticare il ciclismo.
Osborne House è a 20 km da questa casa vacanze, mentre The Isle of Wight Donkey Sanctuary si trova a 9,2 km dalla struttura. Aeroporto di Bournemouth si trova a 57 km di distanza.
Le distanze nella descrizione della struttura sono calcolate con © OpenStreetMap

hotels.name: Relaxing private entrance ensuite room with stunning sea view and swimspa
hotels.description_fr:
Situé à Saint Lawrence, l’hébergement Relaxing private entrance ensuite room with stunning sea view and swimspa offre une vue sur la mer. Il possède une terrasse et une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite. Cet hébergement est installé à 7,5 km de : Blackgang Chine. Il propose un jardin et un parking privé gratuit.

Cet appartement comprend 1 chambre, ainsi que 1 salle de bains comportant une douche, un bain à remous et un sèche-cheveux. Des serviettes et du linge de lit sont disponibles.

L’établissement Relaxing private entrance ensuite room with stunning sea view and swimspa dispose d’un bain à remous.

Vous séjournerez à respectivement 23 km et 7,4 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Osborne House et The Isle of Wight Donkey Sanctuary. L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport de Bournemouth) est à 65 km.
hotels.description_en:
Modern Comforts: The apartment offers a recently renovated, adults-only environment with free WiFi, a sun terrace, and a garden. Guests can relax in the hot tub or enjoy the outdoor seating area.
Stunning Views: The property features a swimspa with sea views, a pool with a view, and a terrace. Garden views enhance the serene atmosphere, perfect for unwinding.
Convenient Amenities: Free on-site private parking, bicycle parking, and free WiFi ensure a comfortable stay. Additional amenities include a coffee machine, refrigerator, and TV.
Local Attractions: Located 8 km from Blackgang Chine and 23 km from Osborne House, the apartment is close to The Isle of Wight Donkey Sanctuary (7 km) and Amazon World Zoo Park (11 km). Bournemouth Airport is 65 km away.
hotels.description_es:
Relaxing private entrance ensuite room with stunning sea view and swimspa, que cuenta con terraza, dispone de alojamiento en Saint Lawrence con wifi gratis y vistas al mar. El alojamiento, que se encuentra a 7,5 km de Parque temático Blackgang Chine, ofrece jardín y parking privado gratis.

Este apartamento de 1 dormitorio ofrece 1 baño con ducha, bañera de hidromasaje y secador de pelo. Hay toallas y ropa de cama en el apartamento.

En el apartamento, la clientela puede disfrutar de bañera de hidromasaje.

Castillo de Osborne está a 23 km del alojamiento, y The Isle of Wight Donkey Sanctuary está a 7,4 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Bournemouth) está a 65 km.

A las parejas les encanta la ubicación — Le han puesto un 9,6 para viajes de dos personas.
hotels.description_pt:
Apresentando um terraço, Relaxing private entrance ensuite room with stunning sea view and swimspa dispõe de acomodações em Saint Lawrence com acesso Wi-Fi gratuito vista do mar. Situado a 7,5 km de Blackgang Chine, o alojamento fornece um jardim e estacionamento privado gratuito.

Este apartamento de 1 quarto inclui 1 casa de banho com chuveiro, banheira de hidromassagem e um secador de cabelo. Toalhas e roupa de cama são providenciadas neste apartamento.

Relaxing private entrance ensuite room with stunning sea view and swimspa oferece aos hóspedes a oportunidade de desfrutar de uma banheira de hidromassagem.

Osborne House fica a 23 km de Relaxing private entrance ensuite room with stunning sea view and swimspa, enquanto The Isle of Wight Donkey Sanctuary fica a 7,4 km de distância.
hotels.description_it:
Dotato di terrazza, Relaxing private entrance ensuite room with stunning sea view and swimspa è un alloggio a Saint Lawrence che mette a disposizione la vista sul mare e il WiFi gratuito. Situata a 7,5 km da Parco Divertimenti Blackgang Chine, la struttura prevede un giardino e il parcheggio privato gratuito.

Questo appartamento con 1 camera da letto presenta 1 bagno con doccia, vasca idromassaggio e asciugacapelli. Presso questo appartamento troverete asciugamani e lenzuola a disposizione.

Presso questo appartamento potrete usufruire di una vasca idromassaggio.

Osborne House è a 23 km da Relaxing private entrance ensuite room with stunning sea view and swimspa, mentre The Isle of Wight Donkey Sanctuary si trova a 7,4 km di distanza.

hotels.name: The Little Red lion
hotels.description_fr:
Situé à Thorpe, l’hébergement The Little Red lion met à votre disposition une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite et offre une vue sur le jardin. Cet hébergement est installé à 1,7 km de : Thorpe Park. Il comprend une terrasse et un parking privé gratuit.

Cet appartement comporte 1 chambre, une télévision à écran plat, ainsi qu’une cuisine.

Vous séjournerez à respectivement 13 km et 14 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Château de Windsor et Legoland Windsor. L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport de Londres Heathrow) est à 9 km.

Les distances indiquées dans la description de l'établissement sont calculées avec © OpenStreetMap.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Living Space: The Little Red Lion in Thorpe offers a one-bedroom apartment with a terrace and garden views. The kitchen is fully equipped, and a TV provides entertainment.
Essential Facilities: Guests enjoy free WiFi, a terrace, and free on-site private parking. The reception staff speak English, ensuring a pleasant stay.
Local Attractions: Thorpe Park is a 19-minute walk away, while Windsor Castle lies 12 km from the property. London Heathrow Airport is 9 km distant, and rafting opportunities are available in the surroundings.
Distance in property description is calculated using © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_es:
The Little Red lion es un alojamiento con wifi gratis y vistas al jardín que se encuentra en Thorpe. El alojamiento, que está a 19 min a pie de Parque temático Thorpe, dispone de terraza y parking privado gratis.

Este apartamento cuenta con 1 dormitorio, TV de pantalla plana y cocina.

Castillo de Windsor está a 13 km del alojamiento, y Legoland Windsor está a 14 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Londres Heathrow) está a 9 km.

Las distancias en la descripción del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMap©
hotels.description_pt:
Com acesso Wi-Fi gratuito e vista do jardim, The Little Red lion encontra-se em Thorpe. Situado a 19 minutos a pé de Thorpe Park, o alojamento apresenta um terraço e estacionamento privado gratuito.

Este apartamento apresenta 1 quarto, uma televisão de ecrã plano e uma cozinha.

Castelo de Windsor fica a 13 km de The Little Red lion, enquanto Legoland Windsor está a 14 km da propriedade. O Aeroporto de Londres - Heathrow fica a 9 km de distância.

A distância mencionada na descrição do alojamento é calculada com o © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_it:
The Little Red lion offre un alloggio nella città di Thorpe e dispone di WiFi gratuito e vista sul giardino. Situata a 1,7 km da Thorpe Park, la struttura propone una terrazza e il parcheggio privato gratuito.

Questo appartamento presenta 1 camera da letto, una TV a schermo piatto e una cucina.

Castello di Windsor è a 13 km da questo appartamento, mentre Legoland Windsor si trova a 14 km dalla struttura. Aeroporto di Londra-Heathrow si trova a 9 km di distanza.

Le distanze nella descrizione della struttura sono calcolate con © OpenStreetMap

hotels.name: The Turret on the Thames
hotels.description_fr:
L’hébergement The Turret on the Thames se situe à Staines, à seulement 1,2 km de ce lieu d’intérêt : Thorpe Park. Il offre une vue sur le cours d’eau et possède une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite ainsi qu’un parking privé gratuit. Cet appartement met à votre disposition un balcon.

Cet appartement compte 1 chambre, une cuisine avec un réfrigérateur et un lave-vaisselle, une télévision à écran plat, un coin salon, ainsi que 1 salle de bains possédant une baignoire ou une douche. Cet hébergement met à votre disposition des serviettes et du linge de lit.

Vous séjournerez à respectivement 12 km et 13 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Château de Windsor et Métro Hounslow West. L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport de Londres Heathrow) est à 7 km.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Living Space: The Turret on the Thames in Staines offers a one-bedroom apartment with a balcony providing river views. The property includes a fully equipped kitchen, washing machine, and free WiFi.
Modern Amenities: Guests enjoy free on-site private parking, a work desk, and a seating area. The apartment features a dining area, TV, and free toiletries.
Prime Location: Located 7 km from London Heathrow Airport, the apartment is a 13-minute walk from Thorpe Park. Nearby attractions include Windsor Castle (12 km) and Hampton Court Palace (16 km).
Distance in property description is calculated using © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_es:
The Turret on the Thames está en Staines, a solo 13 min a pie de Parque temático Thorpe, y dispone de alojamiento con vistas al río, wifi gratis y parking privado gratis. Este apartamento tiene acceso a un balcón.

Este apartamento tiene 1 dormitorio, cocina con nevera y lavavajillas, TV de pantalla plana, zona de estar y 1 baño con bañera o ducha. Hay toallas y ropa de cama en el apartamento.

Castillo de Windsor está a 12 km del alojamiento, y Estación de metro Hounslow West está a 13 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Londres Heathrow) está a 7 km.

Las distancias en la descripción del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMap©
hotels.description_pt:
The Turret on the Thames situa-se em Staines, apenas a 13 minutos a pé de Thorpe Park, e dispõe de acomodações com vista do rio, acesso Wi-Fi gratuito e estacionamento privado gratuito. Este alojamento dispõe de uma varanda.

Este apartamento tem 1 quarto, cozinha com um frigorífico e uma máquina de lavar louça, uma televisão de ecrã plano, uma área de estar e 1 casa de banho dispondo de banheira ou chuveiro. Toalhas e roupa de cama são providenciadas neste apartamento.

Castelo de Windsor fica a 12 km de The Turret on the Thames, enquanto Estação de Metro de Hounslow West fica a 13 km da propriedade. O Aeroporto de Londres - Heathrow fica a 7 km de distância.

A distância mencionada na descrição do alojamento é calculada com o © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_it:
A 1,2 km da Thorpe Park a Staines, The Turret on the Thames mette a disposizione un alloggio con vista sul fiume, WiFi gratuito e parcheggio privato gratuito. In questo appartamento avrete accesso a un balcone.

Questo appartamento ha 1 camera da letto, una cucina con frigorifero e lavastoviglie, una TV a schermo piatto, un’area salotto e 1 bagno con vasca o doccia. Presso questo appartamento troverete asciugamani e lenzuola tra i servizi offerti.

Castello di Windsor è a 12 km da questo appartamento, mentre Stazione Metro Hounslow West si trova a 13 km dalla struttura. Aeroporto di Londra-Heathrow si trova a 7 km di distanza.

Le distanze nella descrizione della struttura sono calcolate con © OpenStreetMap

hotels.name: Egham - Lovely 4 Bedrooms Specious Furnished Property
hotels.description_fr:
L’hébergement Egham - Lovely 4 Bedrooms Specious Furnished Property se trouve à Egham, à seulement 4,9 km de ce lieu d’intérêt : Thorpe Park. Il offre une vue sur le jardin et propose une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite ainsi qu’un parking privé gratuit. Cette maison de vacances est à respectivement 9,2 km et 11 km de : Château de Windsor et Legoland Windsor.

Cette maison de vacances compte 4 chambres, un salon comportant une télévision à écran plat, une cuisine entièrement équipée avec un réfrigérateur et un lave-vaisselle, ainsi que 4 salles de bains avec une douche. Cet hébergement met à votre disposition des serviettes et du linge de lit.

Vous séjournerez à respectivement 13 km et 14 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Métro Hounslow West et Parc d’attractions LaplandUK.
hotels.description_en:
Spacious Accommodation: Egham - Lovely 4 Bedrooms Specious Furnished Property in Egham offers four bedrooms and four bathrooms. The holiday home features two bedrooms and a dining area, providing ample space for guests.
Modern Amenities: Guests enjoy free WiFi, an electric vehicle charging station, and free on-site private parking. The property includes a fully equipped kitchen with a refrigerator, microwave, dishwasher, and electric kettle. Additional amenities include a washing machine, work desk, and TV.
Local Attractions: Located 4.9 km from Thorpe Park, 9 km from Windsor Castle, and 7 km from London Heathrow Airport. Nearby attractions include Legoland Windsor (11 km) and Hampton Court Palace (16 km). Rafting is available in the surrounding area.
hotels.description_es:
Egham - Lovely 4 Bedrooms Specious Furnished Property se encuentra en Egham, a solo 4,9 km de Parque temático Thorpe, y ofrece alojamiento con vistas al jardín, wifi gratis y parking privado gratis. Esta casa o chalet está a 9,2 km de Castillo de Windsor y a 11 km de Legoland Windsor.

La casa o chalet de 4 dormitorios cuenta con sala de estar con TV de pantalla plana, cocina totalmente equipada con nevera y lavavajillas, y 4 baños con ducha. Hay toallas y ropa de cama en la casa o chalet.

Estación de metro Hounslow West está a 13 km del alojamiento, y LaplandUK está a 14 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Londres Heathrow) está a 7 km.

Las distancias en la descripción del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMap©
